TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kevin_Allison, title = Kevin_Allison, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kevin_Allison} }

S.FORM: Kevin Allison kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 2, Kevin Allison, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Kevin Allison kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 2, Kevin Allison, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ke*in allis~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ke*in allis~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
